examples: Kill me, dethrone me, but please leave me a little dignity!
The plant may dethrone an 18-leaf clover, also found by Shigeo, in the Guinness World Records.
Do you think Sony has what it takes to dethrone Apple? Is it too late? Sound off in the comments!
Swinmurn came up with the idea after leaving Zappos and founding a small clothing brand, Dethrone, in 2008.
Cook is making his second world title tilt after last summer's unsuccessful bid to dethrone WBO featherweight champion Steve Luevano.
